128. One will become the Lord of an island, if Cancer ascends with Jupiter and the Moon therein,
while Venus, Saturn and the Sun are exalted, as Mars is in his own divisions).
129. If Jupiter and Venus together occupy Pisces, while the Full Moon is exalted (in Amsa), as
the Sun occupies Aries in aspect to a malefic planet, the native will become a king and the
dust emanating, as a consequence of the movements of his Army will cloud the Sun, so that
the lotus will close its petals due to misconception of the sun having set.
130. If the 3rd and the 6th are occupied by fallen/inimical planets, while a strong benefic is in an
Angle with due deep exaltation, as the Moon is in Cancer identical with the 10th House, one
